---
title: "Team Science Training Recordings"
---

<!---
To get the video embedding code (for videos stored in Drive):
1. Click into the video file of image in the Google Drive
2. Click the "File" menu
3. Click "Get embed link"
4. Paste the newly-copied link into the relevant Quarto doc
--->

Missed the training? Don't worry! We record most of our trainings and you can watch them below.

## Facilitating a Successful Working Group

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Aug. 21^st^ 2025, Courtney Scarborough & Heather Lahr**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Xn-jATeL5IkLhKj1NwTYrzgWcXQ10fW_/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::

## 2 LESSON NAME

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Dec. 4^th^ 2025, INSTRUCTOR**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1744ieGoL_GXMglC_zfLB_fbdryygA3o-/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::

## 3 LESSON NAME

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Dec. 4^th^ 2025, INSTRUCTOR**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1744ieGoL_GXMglC_zfLB_fbdryygA3o-/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::

## Making One Pagers with Google Documents

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

<!---
Date/instructor unknown

**Dec. 4^th^ 2025, INSTRUCTOR**
--->

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PfOcQaiDtlcYymEkyW_rvkuMSpyQ-Z3k/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::

## 5 LESSON NAME

:::{.panel-tabset}
### 2025-26 Training Recordings

**Dec. 4^th^ 2025, INSTRUCTOR**

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1744ieGoL_GXMglC_zfLB_fbdryygA3o-/preview" width="640" height="480"></iframe>

:::
